## Summary

- Explain the problem and the change

## Verification

- [ ] `corepack pnpm lint`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm typecheck`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm test`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm build`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm size`

## Documentation

- [ ] README updated
- [ ] Docs updated
- [ ] Changeset added when required
